title: ligularia hookeri
intro: Ligularia hookeri, also known as Japanese leopard plant or Japanese ligularia, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It is widely cultivated for its ornamental value, particularly in Asian gardens, due to its striking foliage and vibrant yellow flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, with medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ligularia hookeri include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and acting as an antiseptic, and it is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal purposes.
